title: U.S. allows temporary purchases of Russian oil already at sea to stabilize energy markets
summary_full: The U.S. has temporarily authorized the purchase of Russian oil stranded at sea to stabilize energy markets.
summary_public: The U.S. has temporarily authorized the purchase of Russian oil stranded at sea to stabilize energy markets.

RU.label: neutral
RU.evidence: U.S. allows temporary purchases of Russian oil
